behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names resolveConfig, globalFlags, linkerFlags, webkit.build, file paths (scripts/build/config.ts, flags.ts, deps/webkit.ts), exact error string, feature labels pgo-gen/pgo-use, schema keys pgoGenerate/pgoUse, and compiler flags.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required behaviors (flag names, error message, feature labels, which files host the flag arrays) without specifying line-level edits or exact implementation.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests only check that flags contain substrings like '-fprofile-generate' and that config preserves pgoGenerate/pgoUse — alternative implementations using different internal helpers would still pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests import resolveConfig, globalFlags, linkerFlags, webkit.build and actually call them via node subprocess, checking returned values and thrown errors.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests assert specific config values preserved, exact error messages thrown, and specific flag strings in arrays — a stub would not satisfy these.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover mutual exclusivity, schema preservation, feature label, compile flags, link flags, webkit forwarding, and pgoUse flags — matching instruction requirements.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped under TestPGOBehavior class with clear names (test_pgo_mutual_exclusivity, test_pgo_compile_flags, etc.) and each TS test has comments.

structured_data_schema.reason: Config schema keys pgoGenerate and pgoUse are explicitly documented in instruction.md under 'Config Schema'.

no_typos.reason: Filenames, paths, flag names, and variables are consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files at module level (scripts/build/config.ts, flags.ts, deps/webkit.ts) which is appropriate context, not line-level hints.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd-edits/config task.
